name_en: M11429 M83546Low Key features a modern minimalist design, complemented by extremely soft and smooth calfskin and exquisite details. These include the LV embossed lock and calf hair leather lining. This carry-all style features a main compartment with a zipper for storing essentials like a phone, wallet, and keys, and an adjustable strap for waist or crossbody wear.
name_cn:
M11429 M83546Low Key features a modern minimalist design, complemented by extremely soft and smooth calfskin and exquisite details. These include the LV embossed lock and calf hair leather lining. This carry-all style features a main compartment with a zipper for storing essentials like a phone, wallet, and keys, and an adjustable strap for waist or crossbody wear.
28 x 13 x 5.5 cm (Depth x Height x Width)
